message:
feat(demo_showcase): add dashboard uptime/SLA widgets and improve UI

Dashboard time widgets (bd-39hl):
- Add uptime stopwatch displaying DD:HH:MM:SS format
- Add incident SLA countdown timer with urgency levels
- Implement SlaUrgency enum (Normal/Warning/Critical/Breached)
- Timer decrements automatically with tick updates

Sidebar focus transitions (bd-30md):
- Add focus_intensity parameter for smooth focus animations
- Show border highlight when focus_intensity > 0.5
- Add detailed docstrings for view() method

Guided tour keybinding fix:
- Change tour start key from '!' to '`' (backtick) for easier access
- Update all tour step descriptions to reflect new keybinding

Beads sync:
- Mark bd-39my (async job runner) as closed
- Update bd-39hl (stopwatch/timer widgets) as in_progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
